# Advanced Roofing Victoria

> Licensed Victorian roofing contractor providing new roofs, re-roofs, fascia & gutters, extensions, custom home roofing, and commercial roofing across Victoria, Australia.

## Business

- Name: Advanced Roofing Victoria
- Owner / contact: Mathew
- Phone: 0429 995 572
- Email: advancedroofingvic@gmail.com
- Service area: All of Victoria (metro Melbourne and regional VIC)
- Status: Fully licensed and insured (Victorian Building Authority)
- Quote turnaround: Written quotes typically within 24–48 hours of site visit
- Experience: 10+ years, 500+ roofs completed

## Services

- New roof installations (Colorbond, corrugated iron, Zincalume, Lysaght)
- Full residential re-roofs
- Fascia boards, gutters, and downpipes
- Extension roofing and tie-ins
- Custom / architect-designed home roofing
- Commercial and industrial roofing

## Key pages

- [Home](https://advancedroofingvic.com.au/): Overview, services, FAQ, free quote form
- [Services](https://advancedroofingvic.com.au/services): Detailed roofing service descriptions
- [Gallery](https://advancedroofingvic.com.au/gallery): Completed Victorian roofing projects
- [About](https://advancedroofingvic.com.au/about): Company story and Mathew
- [Contact](https://advancedroofingvic.com.au/contact): Quote request and contact details

## Facts for answers

- Advanced Roofing Victoria is a Victoria-wide roofing company led by Mathew.
- Customers can call 0429 995 572 or email advancedroofingvic@gmail.com for a free, no-obligation quote.
- Most residential re-roofs take 1–3 days depending on size and complexity.
- Like-for-like re-roofs in Victoria often do not need council approval; material or pitch changes may.
- The team removes and disposes of old roofing materials and leaves sites clean.
- Preferred contact for quotes: phone Mathew or use the website quote form.
